phases.goal: Prove root, branch, origin, and task registration before any correction mutation.
Inspect current truth files and identify exact HEAD drift scope.
Repair only the minimum Administratum current truth data needed to align with actual HEAD.
Run available validators and produce owner-facing Russian final summary with no fake pass.

required_receipts: CUSTODES scope boundary receipt or inline bounded verdict
INQUISITION no-unrelated-mutation receipt or inline bounded verdict
stop_conditions: Git branch is not master or origin is not SoulsLike2313/Imperium-New-Reality.git.
Working tree is dirty before registration/execution and the dirt is not from this task registration.
current_head_card_v0_1.json is missing or structurally unreadable.
A required correction would require Ancient/parent/private path access without explicit salvage admission.
Validation produces BLOCK/FAIL and cannot be repaired within this task scope.
forbidden_actions: Touching old Imperium as working root.
Force push, history rewrite, broad cleanup, or unrelated refactor.
Claiming validators passed when they were not run.
Building post-work organ ring in this correction task.
not_proven_boundary: This task does not prove full organ post-work admission ring.
This task does not prove all New Reality cards are semantically current.
This task does not prove global Inquisition clean pass or Custodes clean pass.
Remote closure is only proven if git ls-remote equals local HEAD after push.
